commits.message:
perf(site): bundle demos against shared lib.js — 1.9 MB snapshot

Ship a single pre-bundled lib.js that contains react + ink + rich-js-ink
with all deps inlined and Node built-ins kept external. Each demo is a
tiny file (~1KB) that imports from "./lib.js".

Eliminates npm install in WebContainer, shared React/Ink means React
hooks work correctly, and snapshot is 1.9 MB (was 27 MB with full
node_modules, or 83 MB if each demo was self-contained).

Boot flow: fetch 1.9 MB snapshot in parallel with WebContainer.boot(),
mount snapshot (instant), shell ready.
